content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-facing string "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" in SettingsView.swift:12 labels a shipping feature as experimental/unfinished.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may interpret "Experimental" copy shown to end users as signaling an incomplete or beta feature, raising 2.1/2.2 completeness concerns even though the app itself isn't a beta build. Store metadata and release notes are clean, but this in-app toggle description could still trigger questions. Consider rewording to something like "New feature — sort order may change" instead of "Experimental."
